name: Caribou Steaks with Green Peppercorn Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully trim away all visible fat from the caribou steaks.
2. Combine 3 cloves of garlic and olive oil in a bowl.
3. Pour the mixture over the steaks and marinate, refrigerated, for at least one night.
4. Season the steaks with salt and freshly ground pepper.
5. Broil or grill the steaks for 5 to 7 minutes per side, or until the meat has only a hint of pink.
6. For the sauce, melt 4 tablespoons of butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
7. Stir in the remaining ingredients (whole green peppercorns, salt, and cognac) into the melted butter.
8. Heat the sauce to boiling, stirring occasionally.
9. Place the steaks on warmed plates and pour the sauce over them before serving.
